---
title: "Geography of India"
subtitle: "Comprehensive study of India's physical environment, resources, economy, and society."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include geography-of-india/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Geography of India** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include geography-of-india/01-physiography-of-india.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/02-drainage-systems.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/03-indian-climate-and-monsoon.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/04-soils-and-vegetation.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/05-indian-agriculture.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/06-industries-and-development.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/07-transport-trade-planning.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include geography-of-india/08-natural-disasters.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/09-population-dynamics.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/10-globalisation-impact.md >}}

---
